angle: You did not start hosting to babysit another app. Hububb runs the property and you just check the reports.
brief: Marketer static batch, concept 4 of 8 (HUB_JUL_MAR_NOTADASH), old way vs new way. Pillar: runs-itself, funnel: convert. Audience: side-hustle host, London. Compare template, dark and clean, no photo: glassy muted left column with red crosses, white right column with green checks (design-system accent tokens), white CTA pill and proof chip below. Copy uses the answered-automatically product truth. Paid-ad candidate.

copy.headline: It handles 90% of your hosting for you
copy.subhead: Cleaning booked, pricing adjusted, guests answered. You just check the reports.
copy.proof: Set up in under fifteen minutes.

left: Cleans chased in a group chat

social.primaryText:
You did not start hosting to babysit another app.

Hububb runs the property for you: bookings, guests, cleaning, pricing, all handled, with clear reports while you stay in control. It handles 90%+ of the day-to-day, so you check in when you want to, not because it needs you.

Connect a single listing first and move more over only when it's earning.
